name: Nikhil Chauhan
my_twin: If I had a personal digital twin, it would track how I approach problem-solving and coding challenges—identifying where I make logical mistakes, where I take more time, and how I debug errors. It would also analyze patterns in my projects, like my work in machine learning and fraud detection, and suggest improvements in model design and efficiency. Over time, it would help me become faster, more accurate, and better at building scalable and intelligent systems.
